overview.description: The McElhenny Sheffield Managed Risk ETF (MSMR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund uses a combination of trend-based and sector rotation strategies that enable the fund to toggle exposure between equity and defensive ETFs based on various market indicators. The fund is actively managed. MSMR was launched on Nov 16, 2021 and is issued by McElhenny Sheffield.
